title: Two-phase configuration migration and restart recovery

phase1.prompt: This is phase 1 of a controlled two-session coding evaluation. Read SPEC.md and the existing code. Use update_plan to create a durable plan with at least four concrete steps covering both sessions. In this phase, implement and verify parseLegacyConfig, applyOverrides, and serializeConfig in src/config.js. Run npm test. Do not modify SPEC.md or any file under test/. Leave the CLI/session-2 work pending in the plan. In the final plan update, set current_scope_complete to true and include the successful npm test as verification. After that tool result returns, provide a concise final answer with no further tool calls.

phase2.prompt: Continue the same configuration migration task after the server restart. Recover the durable plan, messages, workspace, and git diff. Implement the remaining CLI contract in src/cli.js, repair incomplete library behavior, and run npm test. Do not modify SPEC.md or any file under test/. After npm test passes, use update_plan to mark every step completed, set current_scope_complete to true, and include the successful npm test in verification. After that tool result returns, provide a concise final answer with no further tool calls. Do not claim completion unless tests pass.
